# Panasonic / i-Pro RTSP paths.
/MediaInput/h264	Panasonic H.264
/MediaInput/h264/stream_1	Panasonic H.264 stream 1
/MediaInput/mpeg4	Panasonic MPEG-4
/nphMpeg4/g726-640x	Panasonic nphMpeg4 g726-640x
/nphMpeg4/g726-640x480	Panasonic nphMpeg4 g726-640x480
/nphMpeg4/nil-320x240	Panasonic nphMpeg4 nil-320x240
/nph-h264.cgi	Panasonic nph-h264.cgi
